basic_details.job_title: GVHSS Rayagada Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Government Vocational Higher Secondary School, Rayagada (GVHSS Rayagada)
basic_details.short_information: Government Vocational Higher Secondary School, Rayagada (GVHSS Rayagada) Guest Faculty (Horticulture Trade) Notification 2026 has been released on 03 June 2026 on the official website of GVHSS Rayagada. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the GVHSS Rayagada Guest Faculty (Horticulture Trade) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc (Agri) with 55% of Marks, & at least 1 Year work Experience
qualification.details: B.Sc (Agri) with 55% of Marks, & at least 1 Year work Experience

salary_details.details: Rs 400/- per class / lecturer of 45 minutes duration subject to a ceiling of maximum 40 classes with Rs16,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GVHSS Rayagada Guest Faculty (Horticulture Trade) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download GVHSS Rayagada Guest Faculty (Horticulture Trade) Job 2026 Notification

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GVHSS Rayagada Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Guest Faculty (Horticulture Trade) position at GVHSS Rayagada is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required qualification for the Guest Faculty (Horticulture Trade) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc (Agri) degree with at least 55% marks and have a minimum of 1 year of work experience in the relevant field.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Guest Faculty (Horticulture Trade) position is 65 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves Certificate Verification. Further details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Guest Faculty (Horticulture Trade) position?
faq.answer: The salary is structured as Rs. 400/- per class/lecturer of 45 minutes, with a monthly ceiling of Rs. 16,000/- for a maximum of 40 classes.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Government Vocational Higher Secondary School, Rayagada (GVHSS Rayagada).

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 27 GVHSS/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form download link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article once released.
